reviews.comment:
La entrada al lugar es rara y obligada en un sentido que perjudica la circulación. Pero se la arreglan bien en acomodar el tránsito y nunca se vio afectado. Malos baños y el local de atención al público es muy pequeño.

(Translated by Google)
The entrance is unusual and one-way, which disrupts traffic. However, they manage the flow well, and it's never been affected. The restrooms are poor, and the customer service area is very small.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NFliV0NREAE

reviews.comment:
Una sola persona para atender en toda la estación, y obviamente espera de más de una hora para cargar nafta.... Que bien que atienden a los turistas en San Clemente!

(Translated by Google)
Only one person to serve the entire station, and obviously waits for more than an hour to fill up with gas... How great they are at serving tourists in San Clemente!
